description_long: This house features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding and a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings, wooden steps, and colorful bunting, creating a welcoming entryway. Windows are asymmetrically placed, with a large shuttered window on one side and smaller windows on the upper level, some partially covered by overhanging roof sections. A chimney is visible on one side, suggesting a fireplace inside. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with minimal window openings and a focus on the roof's expanse. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional American homes, blending functional and decorative elements.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed house with a covered front porch, asymmetrical windows, and a prominent chimney. The design features traditional siding, white railings, and a welcoming entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large shuttered window, a satellite dish, and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch with white railings, wooden steps, and colorful bunting, as well as the main entryway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chimney, minimal window openings, and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Rear view with a plain facade, no visible windows or doors, and the gable roof's peak.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white railings, wooden steps, and decorative bunting
